01 — Experience

Where I've worked

Wickes UK
Jun 2025 – Jan 2026
8 months

Data & Reporting
Analyst

Making data move at the speed of decisions.

At Wickes I work within the data and reporting team, supporting supply chain, inventory, and operations analytics across a large UK retail estate. My work sits at the intersection of automation and insight — I build the pipelines that produce the numbers, and surface the stories those numbers are telling.

  • Built automated reporting pipelines reducing manual effort by 40% — from days to 3 seconds
  • Achieved 99% reporting accuracy across supply chain dashboards used by senior operations
  • Identified £340k+ of reducible overstock risk across multi-warehouse inventory using SQL
  • Developed and maintained Looker Studio and Power BI dashboards tracking live KPIs
  • Automated task scheduling and escalation workflows with Google Apps Script and Python
  • Collaborated with supply chain managers to translate business questions into data models
